sequence.name: reinstatement-sapi-acceptReinstatement-sequence

payloadFactory.format: { "errorCode": "404", "errorMessage": "Data not found", "errorDetails": "The data requested is not found in database.", "transactionId": "$1", "timeStamp": "$2" }
{ "errorCode": "404", "errorMessage": "Data not found", "errorDetails": "The data requested is not found in database.", "transactionId": "$1", "timeStamp": "$2" }
